name: Homemade Cream Liqueurs
recipeIngredient: 14 oz Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk (not evaporated milk)
1 1/4 cup Flavored liqueur (almond, coffee, orange, or mint)
1 cup Whipping cream or coffee cream (1/2 pint)
14 oz Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk (not evaporated milk)
1 1/4 cup to 1 3/4 cups Irish whiskey, brandy, rum, rye whiskey, bourbon, scotch
1 cup Whipping cream or coffee cream (1/2 pint)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container, combine all ingredients.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Store tightly covered in the refrigerator up to one month.
4. Stir before serving. Use only Grade A clean, uncracked eggs.
